name: tax_rebalancing
description: Monitors portfolio drift vs target weights and proposes tax-aware rebalancing trades. Prefers tax-loss harvesting and applies German §23 EStG private-sale holding-period logic per lot. Output is formatted for Trade Republic and always requires human approval before execution.

positions.description: Current positions, one entry per tax lot for correct §23 EStG holding-period evaluation.

cost_basis.description: Total cost basis for this lot in account currency.

market_value.description: Current market value of this lot in account currency.

target_weights.description: Map of symbol -> target portfolio weight (fraction 0..1). Must sum to ~1.0.

drift_threshold.description: Absolute weight drift (fraction) that triggers a rebalance proposal for a symbol (default 0.05).

as_of_date.description: Evaluation date, ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today (UTC).

jurisdiction.description: Tax jurisdiction. Only 'DE' (German §23 EStG) is implemented in v1.
